resumeText:
Aryan SharmaAI / Machine Learning Engineer
Bengaluru, India | aryan.sharma@email.com | +91 98765 43210 | linkedin.com/in/aryan-sharma | github.com/aryan-sharma
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Results-driven AI/ML Engineer with 5+ years of experience designing, developing, and deploying machine learning models
and AI-powered products at scale. Expertise in deep learning, NLP, computer vision, and MLOps. Passionate about
converting complex data into actionable intelligence and delivering measurable business impact.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
LanguagesPython, R, SQL, Bash, C++
ML / DL FrameworksTensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, LightGBM
NLP & GenAIHugging Face Transformers, LangChain, OpenAI API, RAG, Fine-tuning LLMs
Computer VisionOpenCV, YOLO, Detectron2, Stable Diffusion, CLIP
MLOps & CloudMLflow, Kubeflow, DVC, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI
Data & VizPandas, NumPy, Spark, Tableau, Matplotlib, Seaborn
DatabasesPostgreSQL, MongoDB, Pinecone, Redis, BigQuery
WORK EXPERIENCE
Senior ML Engineer — Infosys AI Labs
Jan 2022 – Present
• Led end-to-end development of a real-time fraud detection system using Graph Neural Networks, reducing false
positives by 38% and saving $4M annually.
• Designed and deployed a multi-modal recommendation engine (NLP + CV) for an e-commerce client, increasing CTR
by 22%.
• Built a RAG-based internal knowledge assistant using LangChain + Pinecone, cutting support ticket resolution time by
45%.
• Established MLOps pipelines with MLflow and Kubeflow on GCP, reducing model deployment cycle from 3 weeks to 2
days.
Machine Learning Engineer — Mu Sigma Inc.
Jun 2019 – Dec 2021
• Developed a customer churn prediction model (XGBoost + SHAP) achieving 91% AUC for a telecom client with 10M+
customers.
• Fine-tuned BERT-based models for sentiment analysis and entity extraction on 50GB of unstructured customer
feedback.
• Created an automated data pipeline using Apache Spark and Airflow processing 500GB daily on AWS EMR.
• Mentored a team of 4 junior data scientists; conducted weekly knowledge-sharing sessions on deep learning best
practices.
Data Science Intern — Tata Consultancy Services
Jan 2019 – May 2019
• Built an image classification pipeline using ResNet-50 for defect detection in manufacturing, achieving 94.5%
accuracy.
• Automated EDA and feature engineering workflows, reducing pre-modelling time by 30%.
EDUCATION
M.Tech – Artificial Intelligence
IIT Hyderabad
2017 – 2019 | CGPA: 9.1/10

B.Tech – Computer Science & Engineering
NIT Warangal
2013 – 2017 | CGPA: 8.7/10
KEY PROJECTS
• MediScan – AI Radiology Assistant: Built a chest X-ray diagnosis tool using DenseNet-121 achieving 96%
sensitivity on pneumonia detection. Integrated Grad-CAM for explainability. Deployed as a REST API on AWS with
<200ms latency.
• LLM-powered Code Review Bot: Developed a GitHub Action that auto-reviews PRs using GPT-4 fine-tuned on
internal coding standards. Reduced review cycle time by 60% across a 50-engineer team.
• Real-time Object Tracking System: Implemented YOLOv8 + DeepSORT for multi-camera pedestrian tracking in
smart-city infrastructure. Processes 30 FPS on NVIDIA Jetson Orin edge device.
CERTIFICATIONS & ACHIEVEMENTS
• AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty (2023)
• Google Professional ML Engineer (2022)
• DeepLearning.AI MLOps Specialization – Coursera (2021)
• Kaggle Competitions Expert – Top 3% globally; Gold medal in NLP competition (2022)
• Speaker at PyData Hyderabad 2023: 'Scalable RAG Pipelines in Production'
